findings.evidence:
Pattern found in src\index.ts

Code context:
```text
  L24: 
> L25:     const response = await fetch(url.toString(), {
  L26:       headers: {
```
findings.recommendation: Review whether untrusted model/user input can reach this code path. Add allowlists, validation, sandboxing, and tests.
findings.title: Potential risky implementation: JavaScript fetch usage
